feat.name: Nocturnal Tripkee
feat.special: You can take this feat only at 1st level, and you can't retrain out of this feat or into this feat.
feat.text: You tend to do most of your hunting and work at night and have adapted to the requirements of nocturnal life. You gain darkvision, allowing you to see in darkness and dim light just as well as you can in bright light. However, in darkness, you see in black-and-white only.

traits.name: Tripkee
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the tripkee ancestry. Tripkees are a family of froglike humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by tripkees. An item with this trait is created and used by tripkees.
